title: glossanthis radiata
intro: Glossanthis radiata, also known as the Glossy Horkelia or Western Horkelia, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and inflammation due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal disorders, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Glossanthis radiata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, although further research is necessary to confirm its full range of health benefits.
